summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Trading Journal application. Backend: 95.1% success rate (39/41 tests passed). Frontend: 100% core functionality working. All major features tested including auth, trades CRUD, analytics, broker connections, CSV import, and UI navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
critical_bugs.impact: AI insights feature completely broken - users cannot generate Claude AI analysis of their trades
critical_bugs.error_details: Datetime comparison issue in analytics.py or ai_service.py when sorting trades. Line 50 in analytics.py uses datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc) which may be causing the comparison error.
critical_bugs.reproduction: 1. Create at least 1 trade, 2. Call POST /api/ai/insights with prompt_preset='general', 3. Observe 500 error

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 with 0 imports instead of 400 when syncing with invalid credentials
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - graceful handling but incorrect status code. Expected 400 error for invalid credentials but got 200 success.
minor_bugs.expected_behavior: Should return 400 status code with error details when credentials are invalid

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay can block navigation clicks when dialog is open
ui_bugs.impact: User must close dialog or retry click to navigate. Observed when broker connection dialog was open and trying to click settings link.
ui_bugs.workaround: Close dialog first or retry click

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Creates user and returns JWT + user object
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with demo@trading.com works
✅ Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user with valid JWT
✅ Backend: Auth enforcement - 401 for missing/invalid tokens
✅ Backend: POST /api/trades - Creates trade with all fields (symbol, market, side, qty, prices, fees, emotion, notes, etc.)
✅ Backend: P&L computation - Automatically computes P&L, P&L%, and R-multiple
✅ Backend: GET /api/trades - Lists trades with filters (symbol, market_type, status)
✅ Backend: GET /api/trades/{id} - Gets single trade
✅ Backend: PATCH /api/trades/{id} - Updates trade and recomputes P&L
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/trades/{id} - Deletes trade
✅ Backend: POST /api/strategies - Creates strategy
✅ Backend: GET /api/strategies - Lists strategies
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/strategies/{id} - Deletes strategy
✅ Backend: POST /api/tags - Creates tag
✅ Backend: GET /api/tags - Lists tags
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary - Returns all metrics (net_pnl, win_rate, profit_factor, expectancy, max_drawdown, avg_win/loss, best/worst trade, sharpe_ratio, avg_r)
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/equity - Returns equity curve points
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/calendar - Returns daily P&L aggregation
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/breakdown?by=symbol - Breakdown by symbol
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/breakdown?by=strategy_id - Breakdown by strategy
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/breakdown?by=day_of_week - Breakdown by day of week
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/breakdown?by=emotion - Breakdown by emotion
✅ Backend: POST /api/brokers/connections - Creates Binance connection
✅ Backend: POST /api/brokers/connections - Creates Alpaca connection
✅ Backend: POST /api/brokers/connections - Creates OANDA connection
✅ Backend: GET /api/brokers/connections - Lists connections without exposing secrets
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/brokers/connections/{id} - Deletes connection
✅ Backend: POST /api/import/csv/preview - Previews CSV with 10 trades parsed
✅ Backend: POST /api/import/csv - Imports 10 trades from sample CSV
✅ Backend: GET /api/ai/insights - Lists AI insights
✅ Backend: User data isolation - Second user cannot see first user's trades
✅ Frontend: Login page loads with demo credentials pre-filled
✅ Frontend: Login works and redirects to dashboard
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows all KPI cards (Net P&L, Win Rate, Profit Factor, Max Drawdown, Avg Win, Avg Loss, Best Trade, Worst Trade)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows equity curve chart (when data exists)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows P&L calendar heatmap
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows recent trades table
✅ Frontend: Navigation works to all pages (Trades, Strategies, Brokers, Import, Insights, Settings)
✅ Frontend: New Trade form - can fill all fields (symbol, market, side, qty, prices, fees, dates, emotion, notes)
✅ Frontend: New Trade form - Save Trade creates trade and navigates to /trades
✅ Frontend: Trades page shows trades list with all columns
✅ Frontend: Trades page filters work (search, market, status, result)
✅ Frontend: Strategies page allows creating strategies
✅ Frontend: Brokers page shows 3 broker cards (Binance, Alpaca, OANDA)
✅ Frontend: Brokers page - Connect button opens dialog with API key/secret fields
✅ Frontend: Import page shows CSV upload area with supported columns
✅ Frontend: Insights page shows preset buttons (General, Mistakes, Best Setups, Risk, Weekly Recap) and custom prompt input
✅ Frontend: Settings page shows profile, theme toggle, and logout button
✅ Frontend: Theme toggle works (switches between dark/light mode)
✅ Frontend: Logout button clears token and redirects to /login

critical: Fix AI insights 500 error - datetime comparison issue in analytics.py line 50 or ai_service.py. The error 'TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes' occurs when generating insights. Likely caused by comparing datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc) with other datetime objects. Ensure all datetime objects have consistent timezone awareness.
optional: Update broker sync endpoint to return 400 status code instead of 200 when credentials are invalid (currently returns 200 with 0 imports and last_status='error')
Fix dialog overlay z-index issue that can block navigation clicks when dialogs are open
